<!-- A concise description of the change. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New preset program
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation

## For new preset programs

- [ ] Program has a published on-chain Anchor IDL (tested in the app)
- [ ] `programId` is a valid base58 Solana address
- [ ] `category` is one of: `DeFi`, `Staking`, `NFT`, `Governance`
- [ ] Description is one sentence, no trailing period

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] No `console.log` left in code
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated (if applicable)
